title: 10 years of AlphaGo: The turning point for AI | Thore Graepel & Pushmeet Kohli
summary: Google DeepMind marks 10 years since AlphaGo defeated Lee Sedol in Go, reflecting on the match as a turning point for modern AI. The panel discusses how AlphaGo's success using reinforcement learning laid foundations for subsequent breakthroughs including scientific problem-solving in protein folding.
